summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a great show with Keith's lively keyboards shining through
review: Reviewers rave about this performance, calling it awesome and giving it five stars. The soundboard source is presumed clear and the highlight mentioned is Keith Godchaux’s energetic playing throughout the set.
